title: Automation Developer - Python + AI
company_focus: Diversified manufacturing partner for market-leading brands
description:
Flex is the diversified manufacturing partner of choice that
helps market-leading brands design, build and deliver
innovative products that improve the world.

A career at Flex offers the opportunity to make a difference
and invest in your growth in a respectful, inclusive, and
collaborative environment. If you are excited about a role
but don't meet every bullet point, we encourage you to apply
and join us to create the extraordinary.

Job Summary

To support our extraordinary teams who build great products
and contribute to our growth, we’re looking to add a
Automation Engineer – Python + AI located in Chennai
location.

Reports to the Senior Manager, and the role involves,

What a typical day looks like:

- Business Process Automation:
- Design, develop, and deploy Python-based automation
  solutions for enterprise business processes
- Analyze existing business workflows and identify automation
  and optimization opportunities
- Build scalable automation frameworks that improve
  efficiency, accuracy, and turnaround time
- AI-Driven Intelligent Automation:
- Develop and integrate AI/ML models into business workflows
  for intelligent decision-making
- Apply NLP and data analytics to automate document
  processing, emails, tickets, and reports
- Enable self-learning and adaptive automation using AI
  techniques
- Data & System Integration:
- Integrate automation solutions with enterprise applications,
  databases, and APIs
- Manage data ingestion, preprocessing, inference, and output
  pipelines
- Ensure robustness, security, and scalability of automation
  solutions
- Optimization, Reporting & Governance:
- Monitor automation performance using KPIs, metrics, and
  dashboards
- Continuously improve automation accuracy, throughput, and
  cost efficiency
- Ensure compliance with enterprise governance, security, and
  audit requirements
- Collaboration & Leadership:
- Work closely with business users, process owners, and IT
  teams to deliver value-driven automation
- Provide technical guidance and mentoring to junior
  automation engineers
- Contribute to automation standards, best practices, and
  reusable assets

The experience we’re looking to add to our team:

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer science, Information
  Technology, AI/ML, Data Science, or related field
- 2–5 years of experience in Python development and AI-driven
  automation solutions
- Proven experience in Business Process Automation (BPA),
  Intelligent Automation, or Digital Transformation
  initiatives
- Exposure to enterprise systems, workflows, and data-driven
  decision automation
- Core Python & Automation Skills:
- Strong Python programming expertise (mandatory)
- Automation scripts, workflow orchestration, backend
  services, api.
- Experience building end-to-end automation pipelines
- Strong understanding of OOP, modular design, and scalable
  architecture
- Hands-on experience in Linux/Unix environments
- AI / Machine Learning for Automation:
- Practical knowledge of AI/ML concepts applied to business
  automation
- Classification, clustering, prediction, recommendation
- Hands-on experience with Python AI/ML libraries: NumPy,
  Pandas, Scikit-learn, Langchain, OpenAI
- TensorFlow / PyTorch (preferred)
- Experience applying AI to business processes, such as: Web
  Search, Document Search, OCR, Generative AI, Prompting,
  Demand forecasting and optimization, NLP for document
  processing, emails, and chatbots
- Business Process Automation & Platforms:
- Experience with BPA / RPA tools and frameworks (good to
  have): UiPath, Power Automate, or Python-based automation
  frameworks
- Strong understanding of business workflows, SLAs, KPIs, and
  process optimization
- Experience automating manual, repetitive, and rule-based
  enterprise processes
- Data, Integration & Systems:
- Strong knowledge of SQL and enterprise data sources
- Experience with APIs, system integrations, and microservices
- Experience with cloud platforms (Azure / AWS / GCP) for
  automation and AI workloads
- DevOps & Engineering Practices:
- Experience with Git and collaborative development workflows
- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines for deploying automation
  and AI services
- Knowledge of containerization and scalable deployment
  (Docker – good to have)
- Soft Skills & Professional Attributes:
- Strong analytical, problem-solving, and decision-making
  abilities
- Ability to translate business requirements into automated,
  AI-driven solutions
- Excellent communication, documentation, and stakeholder
  management skills
- Ability to work independently and with cross-functional
  business and IT teams
- Certifications in AI/ML, RPA, Cloud Platforms, or Automation
  Technologies are a plus
- Rotational shifts

Here are a few examples of what you will get for the great
work you provide:

- Health Insurance
- PTO

NK99

process. Please email accessibility@flex.com and we'll
discuss your specific situation and next steps (NOTE: this
email does not accept or consider resumes or applications.

a position at Flex, you must complete the application
process first).

use_cases: Business process automation for enterprise workflows
Document processing and OCR using NLP
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves developing and integrating AI/ML models
into business workflows, with hands-on work using Langchain,
OpenAI, TensorFlow/PyTorch, and applying NLP, generative AI,
and prompting techniques. The position focuses on building
AI-driven intelligent automation solutions directly, not
just supporting infrastructure.
